use_cases: Switching between different content sections in a single page layout
Creating multi-step forms or wizards with discrete navigation
Organizing dashboard views into separate tabbed sections
Filtering content by category in product catalogs
Navigating between settings or configuration panels
ai_summary: Animated tab navigation component with discrete styling, featuring smooth transitions between content sections using framer-motion. The component supports multiple tab states and provides visual feedback through motion effects, making it ideal for organizing content in web applications.
